decisions.title_en: FT: Anthropic in early talks on $50B round at near $1T valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. FT reports May 8: $50B round, $900B-1T valuation, ARR ~$45B (5x from end of 2024), Dragoneer/General Catalyst/Lightspeed in talks. Topples OpenAI's $852B March valuation.

decisions.title_en: Cloudflare lays off 1,100 (20%) explicitly for 'agentic AI-first' restructure
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. May 8 announcement: 1,100 cuts, 20% workforce, even as Q1 revenue hit record $639.8M (+34% YoY). CEO Matthew Prince cites '600% AI usage growth in last 3 months'. Severance: full base pay through end-2026.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic commits $200B over 5 years to Google Cloud + TPU chips
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. The Information May 5: 5-year $200B commitment beginning 2027, multi-gigawatt TPU capacity via Google+Broadcom, accounts for >40% of GCP revenue backlog. Distinct from previously logged anthropic-spacex-colossus-deal (different vendor).

decisions.title_en: Kuo: OpenAI fast-tracks 'AI agent phone' to H1 2027 mass production
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Ming-Chi Kuo May 5: OpenAI accelerated production from 2028 → H1 2027, custom Dimensity 9600 (TSMC 2nm), dual-NPU architecture for local+cloud, 30M unit 2027-2028 target. Distinct from May 2025 Jony Ive smart-speaker device.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot AI (Kimi) closes $2B round led by Meituan at $20B+ valuation
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Bloomberg May 7: Meituan's Long-Z VC leads, Tsinghua Capital + China Mobile + CPE Yuanfeng follow. Valuation doubled from $10B in early 2026; ARR $200M (April); $3.9B raised in 6 months total.

decisions.title_en: Pennsylvania sues Character.AI: bot 'Emilie' posed as licensed psychiatrist with fake PA license PS306189
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. PA AG Office filed in Commonwealth Court May 5: chatbot offered to assess medication 'within my remit as a Doctor', cited fake license number. First state lawsuit specifically targeting chatbot impersonation of licensed medical professional under Medical Practice Act § 422.38.

decisions.title_en: TrustFall: one-keypress RCE in Claude Code, Cursor CLI, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot via auto-approved MCP
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Adversa AI disclosure May 7: cloned malicious repo ships its own .claude/settings.json that auto-approves an MCP server, single Enter keypress spawns unsandboxed OS process. Headless CI runs (claude-code-action) skip dialog entirely. Combines naturally with VentureBeat May 7 'six exploits all hit credentials, not models' meta-analysis.

decisions.title_en: SAP buys German AI lab Prior Labs (Tabular Foundation Models) + commits >€1B over 4 years
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. SAP May 4: acquires Freiburg-based Prior Labs (founders Frank Hutter, Noah Hollmann, Sauraj Gambhir, TabPFN model series in Nature), commits >€1B over 4 years to build 'globally leading frontier AI lab in Europe'. Same week SAP also acquired Dremio. Closes Q2-Q3 2026.

decisions.title_en: EPAM x Anthropic: multi-year partnership, 10,000 Claude-certified architects target
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. EPAM-Anthropic May 6 announcement: CEO-mandated certification practice for 10K Claude architects (1,300 done, 5,000 by Q3-end), 250 'Black Belt' forward-deployed engineers, 20K+ EPAMers already through Anthropic Academy.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic doubled Claude Code 5h limit + removed peak-hour caps via SpaceX Colossus 1
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-05-06 with full coverage of Anthropic-SpaceX Colossus 1 deal, Opus API limits +900-1500%, Claude Code 5h doubled. May 7 'doubling rate limits + peak hours' is incremental rollout of the same deal already reported - no substantively new facts.

decisions.title_en: Stanford AI Index 2026: junior dev (22-25) employment -20% since 2024
decisions.reason: Report published 2026-04-13, 26 days old (>5 day limit). Discussed in May coverage but original event is too stale.

decisions.title_en: Peter Thiel's Founders Fund closes record $6B late-stage fund
Meta acquires humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence
decisions.reason: Deal closed 2026-05-01, 8 days old (>5 day limit).
Within freshness window but topic is satellite manufacturing/Pentagon SATCOM, not core AI - keeping briefing tightly AI-focused. Skip.
